title: Segfault following heavy SAVEPOINT usage
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO t1(name, value) SELECT CONCAT('test', x), x * 1.1 FROM (SELECT 1 AS x UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3);
key_bug_features: Heavy SAVEPOINT usage causing inconsistent in-memory journal state
